# streamkap_destination_pinecone (Resource)

Manages a **Pinecone destination connector**.

This resource creates and manages a Pinecone destination for Streamkap data pipelines. Use with **streamkap_pipeline** to connect sources to destinations.

[Documentation](https://docs.streamkap.com/streamkap-provider-for-terraform)



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the destination
- `pinecone_api_key` (String, Sensitive) API key for authenticating with Pinecone

**Security:** This value is marked sensitive and will not appear in CLI output or logs.
- `pinecone_index_name` (String) Name of the target Pinecone index

### Optional

- `batch_size` (String) Number of records per batch. Defaults to `100`.
- `collection_mapping` (String) Mapping between Kafka topic and Pinecone namespace. Use ${topic} for dynamic topic name substitution. Defaults to `${topic}`.
- `delete_enabled` (Boolean) Treat null record values or __deleted=true as deletes. Requires Document ID Strategy to be set to 'Kafka ID' (not 'None'). Defaults to `false`.
- `document_id_field_name` (String) Field name containing the ID in Kafka record. Defaults to `id`.
- `document_id_strategy` (String) Strategy to generate document IDs. 'None' uses random UUIDs (append-only, no upsert/delete support). Defaults to `None`. Valid values: `None`, `Kafka ID`, `Field ID`.
- `pinecone_proxy_host` (String) Proxy host for Pinecone connections
- `pinecone_proxy_port` (Number) Proxy port for Pinecone connections (required if Proxy Host is set)
- `retry_backoff_ms` (String) Backoff time between retries in milliseconds. Defaults to `1000`.
- `retry_max` (String) Maximum number of retry attempts for failed operations. Defaults to `3`.
- `schema_evolution` (String) Controls how schema evolution is handled by the sink connector. For pipelines with pre-created namespaces, set to `NONE`. Defaults to `basic`. Valid values: `basic`, `none`.
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))
- `vector_field_name` (String) Field name containing the embedding vector. Defaults to `vector`.

### Read-Only

- `connector` (String) Connector type
- `connector_status` (String) Current status of the connector. Refreshed on each plan/apply. Values: `Active`, `Paused`, `Stopped`, `Broken`, `Starting`, `Unassigned`, `Unknown`.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the destination

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).
- `delete` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours). Setting a timeout for a Delete operation is only applicable if changes are saved into state before the destroy operation occurs.
- `update` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).
